title: Dream Analysis
description: Receive a dream description, gather personal context, produce a three-framework symbolic analysis (Jungian, Freudian, Eastern), generate an imagery illustration, and compose a PDF report.

analyze_patterns.name: Analyze Patterns
analyze_patterns.does: Find repeating symbols and emotion trends across history

gather_context.name: Gather Context
gather_context.does: Ask 4 personal-context questions to ground analysis

generate_dream_image.name: Generate Imagery
generate_dream_image.does: Render dream imagery from analysis prompt

generate_report.name: Compose Report
generate_report.does: Compose Markdown report and render to PDF

deliverable.description: Dream analysis report (PDF + Markdown) with image and structured trace.
